import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        let v = match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        result = list.push(result, v)
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    let v = match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

mut i = 0
let n = a.len()
while i < n
  let x = match a.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let y = match b.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let s = x + y
  println("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
  i = i + 1
end
